titleStmt.title: SII 29.144: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 144. (A.R. No. B. 743 of 1962-63.) PRINCE OF WALES MUSEUM, BOMBAY.

summary.p: Third slab kept in the Museum.

It records the grant of land in Kanyana (the village) situated in Yijapu by Pāṇḍyachakravarti Baṁma-dēvāḷpendra-dēva to Gagana-Śivēśvarāchārya of the Dūrvāsa munīndra lineage. This grant was in turn made over for the offerings [nivēdya] to the god Vighnēśvara of Nagareśvara by the muni.

In the Annual Report for the year 1962-63 the king's name has been wrongly read as Pāṇḍyachakravarti Dattāḷpēndradēva. The engraving on the stone slab is very clear and the king's name Baṁma-dēvāḷpēndradēva can be read without any ambiguity. In characters of the 13th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī pāṁḍyacakravarti rāya
gajāṁkuśa baṁmadēvā(ḷvē)ṁdra
dēvarasaru śrīdurvāsa manīṁdra
vaṁsatilaka lakṣādhyāyasaṁ
tati saṁjātarappa śrīmatu gagana
śivaśvadācāryyarige dhammōtta
ravāgi koṭṭa yijipinalu ka
nyānada beṭṭu karamarasa
hitaṁ Ācāryyaru tā
vu nagarēsvarada vighnēsvaradēva
rige nivēdyakke kalpisidaru Ida
nu Avara saṁtatiyavaru
koṁḍanubhavisuvaru
Idakārānu vakrastarāda
re vāraṇāsiyali sā
pā pa .
Digital edition of SII 29.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
